programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Tudor Week
programme.desc: Follow the five remaining bakers as they attempt to re-create dishes fit for the Tudors. The signature is a savoury stuffed pie, the technical is an unusual Tudor biscuit that has the bakers tied up in knots, and the showstopper is a marzipan spectacle.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Endeavour: Oracle
programme.desc: As Morse sees in the new year – 1970 – at an opera house in Venice, a murder in Oxford puts Thursday on a quest to find the man responsible. Returning home, Morse makes a new acquaintance, and old friendships show signs of strain.

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice
programme.desc: Lizzie and the Gardiners are invited to dine with Bingley, and his sisters, Darcy and Georgiana at Pemberley.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Kenny Kentrosaurus/ Don and the Troodons
programme.desc: The family travels to Africa to meet Kenny Kentrosaurus. The Pteranodon family oversleeps.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: All Sorts of Things/ Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Nick and Sally can't agree on the 'right' way to sort their toys. The Cat takes them to Toborrowland.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Girl Dishonored
programme.desc: A rape on a college campus uncovers a school board that hinders the investigation, giving way to more tragedy.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Conversion
programme.desc: A young woman is raped by her church group leading Barba to argue the First Amendment doesn't entitle a person to break the law.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: American Dream
programme.desc: A hate crime against a Muslim family results in the death of their daughter. When a crucial witness in the case is deported, Barba is forced to drop the charges against the suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Complicated
programme.desc: A 10-year-old kidnapping case is reopened when a young woman is found wandering Central Park alone. Meanwhile, Carisi's conversation with a newspaper reporter puts him in hot water.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead leading Rollins to go undercover at the last place she was seen alive, a high-end rehab center. Meanwhile, Benson tries to overcome her doubts about Sheila.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Send in the Clowns
programme.desc: A student disappears on a school trip to New York City, leading cops to race to find a masked man. Fin and Stone get visits from family.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dance Dance Revelation
programme.desc: It's Luke and Manny's first school dance, and everyone gets in on the fun. Jay and Phil take the boys to the mall, while Claire and Gloria are on the dance committee. Mitch and Cam are horrified to learn that Lily's been biting other children.

programme.title: Modern Family: Slow Down Your Neighbors
programme.desc: Claire hopes to catch and stop a menacing car that speeds though their streets. Phil tries to land an important listing with a difficult client. Jay teaches Manny how to ride a bike. Mitch and Cam have a new, flirty neighbour.

programme.title: Modern Family: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: Plans backfire when the kids go to surprise their parents with breakfast in bed on their anniversary, only to catch Phil and Claire in a compromising position. Jay and Gloria's Vegas plans are thwarted, and Mitch and Cam obsess over a local restaurant.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bixby's Back
programme.desc: To avoid becoming a boring couple, Phil and Claire revisit a roleplaying rendezvous from the previous Valentine's Day. Meanwhile, Jay plans an elaborate surprise for Gloria, and an admirer comes between Cameron and Mitchell on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: Regrets Only
programme.desc: When Phil and Claire have a huge fight and Phil has no idea what it was over, Gloria steps in to counsel Phil and Jay takes Claire. Meanwhile, Jay may come to regret buying Gloria a karaoke machine, and Cameron preps for a fundraiser.

programme.title: Modern Family: Two Monkeys and a Panda
programme.desc: While Claire runs herself ragged trying to play peacemaker with Haley and Alex, Phil sneaks off for a relaxing day at the spa. Gloria is horrified by Jay's plans to purchase two primo side-by-side crypts. Cameron decides to become an author.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: She's Got Us
programme.desc: When Lindsay and Halstead arrive at the scene of a shooting, they discover the only survivor is a young girl. Meanwhile, Antonio and Olinsky look into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging
programme.desc: When the team finds the body of a widowed, single-mother, they are shocked to discover that the victim was in constant contact with Voight's now-reformed son, Justin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Neverland
programme.desc: When a young boy is found murdered, the CSI team uncovers evidence that may link his death to an old case that recently resurfaced.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Forasteira
programme.desc: The NCIS team tracks a highly skilled assailant determined to avenge her father's death by killing a Brazilian diplomat.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Ari, Part 1
programme.desc: While the NCIS team deals with Kate's death, Gibbs's determination to finally put an end to Ari's reign of terror mounts. Though he has no concrete evidence that the sniper was Ari, Gibbs is haunted by the thought that the bullet was meant for him.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Ari, Part II
programme.desc: Gibbs, who is still haunted by images of Kate's death, is determined to stop Ari after he and Director Shepard are the target of sniper fire and Ducky is lured out of the NCIS headquarters by the terrorist.

programme.title: NCIS: The Voyeur's Web
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a marine's wife that was broadcast over the Internet.

programme.title: NCIS: Under Covers

programme.desc: As Jan renovates the condo, Michael confronts his growing debt every way he can, which includes pressuring his employees for a loan. Pam and Jim spend a night at Dwight's family farm, which was converted into a bed and breakfast.

programme.title: The Office: Money
programme.desc: As Jan renovates the condo, Michael confronts his growing debt every way he can, which includes pressuring his employees for a loan. Pam and Jim spend a night at Dwight's family farm, which was converted into a bed and breakfast.

programme.title: The Office: Local Ad
programme.desc: Michael jumps at the chance to display his creativity in an upcoming Dunder Mifflin ad. Meanwhile, Dwight explores the online world of Second Life.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Wars
programme.desc: Karen tries to woo Stanley away from Scranton, and Michael fights back by dragging her ex into the war.

programme.title: The Office: Survivor Man

programme.title: The Office: The Deposition

programme.title: The Office: Dinner Party
programme.desc: Pam and Jim have run out of excuses and are forced to go to Jan and Michael's house for dinner. When Andy and Angela are also invited, Dwight's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.title: The Office: The Chair Model
programme.desc: Michael becomes obsessed with a woman shown in an office supply catalogue. Meanwhile, Kevin and Andy team up to win back their stolen parking spaces. They quickly end up in an all-out war with the bosses of the five business of the office park.

programme.title: The Office: Night Out
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight decide to surprise Ryan in New York for a night of clubbing. Meanwhile, the Scranton branch is upset when they find out they have to come in on a Saturday for Ryan's website project. Jim's plan to save them has unexpected results.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: August 11, 2020

programme.title: South Park: Taming Strange

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I'm Your Boogie Man
programme.desc: A body discovered in a park appears to be the work of Charles Hoyt, the imprisoned serial killer who once abducted and nearly murdered Jane. As Maura struggles to get inside the mind of the killer, Jane must keep her fear in check.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: The Beast in Me
programme.desc: When an identity thief with no apparent identity of his own is found murdered in his car, the investigation leads Jane into Boston's checkered past. A startling discovery about the victim sends Maura on a personal quest.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: When the Gun Goes Bang, Bang, Bang

programme.desc: Jane is honoured as a hero at a public event but the celebration is short-lived when disaster strikes. The ensuing case reunites Jane with an old high school flame who may be the person she needs to help her heal emotionally.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof

programme.title: The Closer: Problem Child
programme.desc: The case of a troubled missing boy quickly turns into a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Sudden Death
programme.desc: When Sanchez's little brother is shot, the team turns its efforts to finding out if this is related to a past case of the detective's. Meanwhile, a reporter accuses Brenda and her squad of only working on cases that are connected to the rich and powerful.

programme.title: The Closer: Split Ends
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Johnson has her hands full trying to solve a murder when a hairdresser on a movie set is found dead. Meanwhile, Brenda's folks are in town pressuring her to set a wedding date.

programme.title: Wife Swap: West/ Gimes
programme.desc: An iron-fisted mom who demands squeaky-clean excellence from her family switches lives with an easygoing mom who believes in fewer rules and puts friendships and family above chores and consequences.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Jeffrey/ Greiner
programme.desc: A high-maintenance former beauty pageant winner who insists on perfection in her palatial home and spoiled daughters swaps places with a junk-collecting, blue-collar mom who believes that grooming and primping are a total waste of time.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Boyd/ Milorey
programme.desc: A mother of three who pushes her kids to be winners at everything they do swaps places with a housewife who serves her video-game obsessed son and husband dinner at their computers. Both families are driven up the wall by their new environments.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: World's Worst Fugitive (Part 1)
programme.desc: The unbelievable story of Robert Durst, the millionaire heir to a vast real estate fortune who has been linked to the deaths of his wife, his best friend, and his neighbor.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: Six weeks after jumping bail in Galveston, Texas, Robert Durst is caught on a store security camera in Pennsylvania shoplifting a sandwich and is quickly sent back to Galveston to stand trial for the murder of his neighbor, Morris Black.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Shaq Does Shark Week
programme.desc: To overcome his fear of sharks, Shaq trains with ex-Navy/ Marine comedian Rob Riggle.

programme.title: ShaqAttack
programme.desc: Shaq and his friends Dude Perfect and Mark Rober investigate which shark has the perfect predatory attack.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Ultimate Breach Off: Sharkmania
programme.desc: With Sharkmania facts and bonus scenes: Researchers use decoys, drones and underwater cameras to collect data on hunting techniques to see if the great white population is rebounding.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist and conservationist Forrest Galante dives into some of the most treacherous, shark-infested waters in the southern hemisphere all in an attempt to rediscover three unique sharks lost to science for as long as 100 years.

programme.title: Will Smith: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Will Smith dives into shark infested-waters to confront his fear of the open seas.

programme.title: Great White Serial Killer Extinction
programme.desc: The Great White Serial Killer returns and it's on a killing spree that may push the California Sea Otter to extinction. Investigators deploy an otter dummy to get a closer look and witness one of the most spectacular attacks in Shark Week history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: Some-Fin Special
programme.desc: Josh Gates talks all things Shark Week with legendary comedian Jeff Foxworthy, star of 'Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks' Forrest Galante and shark expert Paul de Gelder who has the inside scoop on 'Will Smith: Off The Deep End.'

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist and conservationist Forrest Galante dives into some of the most treacherous, shark-infested waters in the southern hemisphere all in an attempt to rediscover three unique sharks lost to science for as long as 100 years.

programme.title: Will Smith: Off the Deep End

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: Some-Fin Special
programme.desc: Josh Gates talks all things Shark Week with legendary comedian Jeff Foxworthy, star of 'Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks' Forrest Galante and shark expert Paul de Gelder who has the inside scoop on 'Will Smith: Off The Deep End.'

programme.title: Andrew Mayne: Ghost Diver
programme.desc: Master illusionist Andrew Mayne is going to attempt to create the first of its kind SHARK SUIT to overcome the senses of a great white shark and make him invisible to the world's most perfect predator.

programme.title: Sharks Among Us
programme.desc: As shark encounters increase around the globe, Dr. Craig O'Connell believes he has developed a solution that will prove once and for all that sharks and people can peacefully coexist and live.

programme.title: Nuclear Sharks
programme.desc: Philippe and Ashlan Cousteau travel with marine biologist Luke Tipple to Bikini Atoll, the nuclear testing site famously destroyed during the Cold War. Durning their travels they discover a large population of reef sharks and illegal fishing.

programme.title: Shark Week with Baby Shark: Baby Shark and Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Not all sea animals swim around with fins; meet Baby Shark's new friend, Sea Turtle, who swims with flippers!

programme.title: Return of the Megashark
programme.desc: Jeff Kurr and Andy Casagrande want to search for the "Megasharks" of New Zealand.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Night Stalker
programme.desc: Shark photographer Chris Fallows embarks on his eighth Air Jaws adventure. Together with shark expert Jeff Kurr and shark biologist Neil Hammerschlag, they discover how great white sharks hunt in total darkness.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Lost Shark
programme.desc: Forrest Galante heads to the Maldives to find a supposedly extinct shark. Unidentified sharks in the area have led many to believe it's alive. He will dive into an untamed wilderness to answer once and for all is the Pondicherry extinct or alive.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist and conservationist Forrest Galante dives into some of the most treacherous, shark-infested waters in the southern hemisphere all in an attempt to rediscover three unique sharks lost to science for as long as 100 years.

programme.title: Ronda Rousey Uncaged
programme.desc: Olympian and UFC hall of famer Ronda Rousey gets help from Paul De Gelder to train through three rounds of survival training against three heavyweight opponents the bull sharks, to build to a 'main event' swimming uncaged with mako sharks.

programme.title: Tyson Vs. Jaws: Rumble on the Reef
programme.desc: Mike Tyson learns how to TKO a shark in the name of research as he goes up against sharks.

programme.title: Laws of Jaws: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Five heart-stopping real-life experiments will separate shark fact and fiction, including electronics to trigger a shark encounter and sharks investigating paddleboards that may cause you to fall off. Watch and learn to navigate these dangerous waters.

programme.title: Shark Lockdown
programme.desc: With the oceans quiet from the global lockdown, Kina Scollay gets in a dive cage in the search for monster shark 747.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Is the Gift Real?
programme.desc: At a group reading, Theresa brings closure to a man who has been tortured by his son's death. Theresa gets a brain scan while she's channeling, in the hopes doctors can tell her what goes on in her head when she's channeling spirit.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: The Spirits of Hollywood
programme.desc: It's a star-studded season finale with 'Don't Be Tardy's' Kim Zolciak-Biermann and the Buffalo Bills' Kroy Biermann, 'Parks & Recreation's' Jim O'Heir, 'The Goldbergs' Wendi McLendon-Covey' and 'Young & Hungry' star Kym Whitley all getting readings.

programme.title: Counting On: The Duggar Dash
programme.desc: It's hard to decide which Duggar is the most competitive, so they decide to put it to a test.The family splits into four teams and Michelle sends them on an exciting race around town.

programme.title: Counting On: Still Growing: A Baby Girl for Joe and Kendra
programme.desc: Jeremy takes a skateboarding lesson with ex-pro skateboarder Brian Sumner. Later, Kendra goes into labor. As contractions intensify quickly, her birth team worries that her doctor might not arrive in time.

programme.title: Counting On: A Beautiful Miracle
programme.desc: Lauren goes into labour 11 days before her due date. After a long and painful labour with this one, she and Josiah can't wait to meet their rainbow baby. Jinger and Jeremy join a Family Fun Night via video chat to share a special message.

programme.desc: Karen and Deon Derrico have a knack for conceiving multiples -- even quintuplets, completely naturally. The stakes are running extra high, however, with their most-recent set of triplets, who seem to be ready for the world well before their due date.

programme.desc: After getting bad news about Hazel, Danielle's determined to make this the best Christmas ever. But Adam has different plans for the holiday, which may sour the celebration. The quints perform in the Christmas show, but stage fright may take center stage.

programme.title: Lost in Transition: Transformation
programme.desc: With Jennifer's support, Larry comes out to their neighbours at Ladies' Night. Troy tells Cindy he's going to get a makeover to look more like Lucy. Stacy & Leslie get romantic. As Beverly tries to chill out, Karen heats things up with a fancy new hairdo.

programme.title: Lost in Transition: Happy for Him, Sad for Us
programme.desc: When Troy goes to a club as Lucy, it fuels a fight between Cindy and him. Jennifer gets emotional after taking Lawren to get women's clothes and her hair done.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Victoria
programme.desc: Victoria's boyfriend moves in on a trial basis to see if he can handle her jarring and flush free lifestyle.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens
programme.desc: The O'Briens refuse to buy anything new, and instead find ingenious ways of fixing their broken belongings. Aimee's total net worth is $5.3 million, but she refuses to spend more than $1,000 a month.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Cheap Hair Day
programme.desc: Kelley saves money by insulating her entire house with plastic. Now, she's bringing her Pilates studio into the home to save $800 per month. Pelin cuts hair and costs at her salon and must find cheap bridal party products to trim her budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Angel/ Mark
programme.desc: Although she's eight months pregnant, Angel frequents local junkyards on a regular basis with her husband Orlando. Mark lives in Las Vegas and yet he manages to not spend a penny of his full time salary.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Guide to Love
programme.desc: Reusing funeral flowers for a date, redoing bedrooms with used hotel sheets, buying thrift store lingerie or planning vow renewals for almost nothing, 'Extreme Cheapskates Guide To Love' shows that love doesn't have to cost a thing.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tanisha's Story
programme.desc: Tanisha is desperate to survive for her kids and avoid her mother's tragic fate of dying at age 50 from super obesity. Megan and Ashley prepare for skin removal surgery.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Justin's Story
programme.desc: A college graduate with a once-promising career, Justin has eaten his life away to the point of never leaving the house for anything but food. Now only the help of Dr. Now's weight-loss program can restore his hopes of living a happy, productive life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lacey's Story
programme.desc: Lacey ballooned up over 600 lbs on pizza and ice cream and knows Dr. Now is her best hope for success. She must now rally her divorced parents around her for support and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney and Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on an LBGT site four years ago and is head-over-heels in love, even though Brenell refuses to video chat with her. Whitney is desperate to find out why and hopes that what she knows about Brenell is true.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Robin and Wayne
programme.desc: It's been three years and Robin is ready to meet her attractive yet elusive online love in real life. Nev and Max want to help, but what they uncover may be too much for Robin to handle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Spencer and Katy
programme.desc: Spencer reveals a secret to Nev and Max that he’s been keeping to himself the last 6 years - he’s in a relationship with one of the world’s biggest pop stars! For the first time Catfish travels international to find the truth.

programme.title: Siesta Key: I Didn’t Even Know That You Were That into Bathing Suits
programme.desc: Juliette and Sam get closer when Sam takes the whole crew to Miami for New Year's. Kelsey's jealous of Juliette's career opportunity. BG and Camilla argue about Amanda. Madisson and Ish clash while house hunting in Siesta Key.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Michael B. Jordan
programme.desc: Actor Michael B. Jordan helps break down outrageous viral videos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XX
programme.desc: Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel get their thrills at 'Crappyland,' meet some 'Secret Aliens,' and experience the joys of having their first 'Naturegasm.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bubba Wallace
programme.desc: NASCAR's Bubba Wallace sits with Rob, Stee-lo and Chanel to drive fast and hard in 'trading paint,' play some 'next level games' and get into some road rage throw downs in street heat.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXIV
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn about 'adult-strength dogs', discuss if any of them are 'snap-prone', and talk about the phenomenon known as 'blimp parents'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wanda Sykes
programme.desc: Comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have 'Unpresidential Nipples,' doling out 'Momforcement,' and the first ever 'Wandamania.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXXII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get clingy with "Sticky Palms," seize the moment in "Shoot Your Shot," and lose all faith in friendship in "Trust Traitors."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Snoop Dogg aka Snoop Lion
programme.desc: Snoop Dogg enjoys some over the tizzle celebrizzles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Karrueche Tran
programme.desc: Star of 'Claws' Karrueche Tran joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to find out the 'salon gets serious', get life syn'd', and watch some suspenseful 'cliff-hangers'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dude Perfect
programme.desc: Trick shot superstars Dude Perfect joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to enjoy some 'Dudebrations,' witness the pain of 'DudPerfect' and learn about the dangers of 'Bad Garretts.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling IX
programme.desc: Rob hangs with Sterling and Chanel to breakdown some 'Extreme Hugging,' see why people get 'Un-followed' and join in the fun of a little 'Slap Fight.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Vaughn Gittin, Jr.
programme.desc: Drift racing super-star, Vaughn Gittin, Jr., reunites with Rob to watch videos featuring Faulty Equipment and High Speed Chaos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the snack zone, learn the dangers of hiring budget babysitters and root on reckless golf cart drivers in 'country club drift.'

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion and Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is torn between his current girlfriend, Raffinee, and his online love, Jeszica. Dorion is willing to give up everything for Jeszica, including Raffinee. Dorion wants to know if Jeszica is really the girl in her pictures.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Colleen and Tony
programme.desc: Colleen met Tony online and fell madly in love. Though they've never met, Tony proposed to Colleen over the phone and she accepted. Now, Nev and Max help her finally face the truth to reveal the mystery man she's engaged to.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim and Matt
programme.desc: Years after online chats, Kim is ready to meet Matt. Max and Nev attempt to bring the pair together, but their discoveries include secrets that may take Kim and Matt further apart.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tracie and Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie,' but Sammie suddenly disappear and Tracie wonders who Sammie really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Truth and Ray'Quan
programme.desc: L.A. fashion designer Truth is hot for his online crush Ray'Quan despite the fact he's in a relationship IRL.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andrea, Alex and Andrea
programme.desc: Fans of popular YouTube star, Andrea Russett, summon Nev and Max to help catch a potential stalker who is impersonating Andrea's family online. The guys soon uncover a web of fake profiles much larger than they thought possible.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Cassie and Steve
programme.desc: Cassie was on a downward spiral until she got a friend request from a rapper named Steve. He became the positive influence she needed to turn her life around. Two and a half years later, Cassie and Steve are engaged but they've never met.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya and Alyx
programme.desc: After Kya fell in love with Alyx online, she confessed she'd been using fake photos.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dejay, Malik and Josiah
programme.desc: Nev and Max get two catfish for the price of one when they discover that Dejay and Malik are being played by the same guy. Sparks fly as they discover just how explosive a love triangle can be.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Keyonnah and Bow Wow
programme.desc: Keyonnah thinks that she's been having an online relationship with the rapper Bow Wow. Soon, they were texting daily, talking on the phone late into the night.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave
programme.desc: 19-year-old dancer Infiniti wants Nev and Max to help her find out if her online love is real. What the pair uncover is far shadier than either of them had ever imagined.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Open Investigation
programme.desc: Nev and Max embark on the biggest case of their lives as they track down the infamous Shelly Chartier to uncover new truths as they investigate the celebrity catfishing of Paris Roxanne and NBA star Chris 'Birdman' Andersen.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Prophet and Trinity
programme.desc: While Prophet, of Grammy-nominated Nappy Roots, is launching his rap career comeback, he connected online with Trinity, a model who has become his rock. He's ready to settle down, but this beauty may be too good to be true.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lucas and Many
programme.desc: Former Playboy model, Jayme has learned that her online boyfriend is not only fake, but appears to be catfishing other women as well. She enlists Nev and Max to help fins the catfish and put an end to his deception.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Mardi Gras

programme.title: Nightwatch: Trust the Ones You're With

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay, Part 2
programme.desc: Four new returning champs battle with all they've got to determine who will be a finalist. In the appetizer basket, a seafood that needs to be tenderized and a canned product that needs to be incorporated.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay, Part 3
programme.desc: A set of twins is among the returning 'Chopped' winners striving for the opportunity to beat Bobby Flay. A cold soup and a stuffed lobster challenge the champs, and keeping track of all four ingredients proves problematic for some.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay, Finale
programme.desc: Ferocious repeat champs return to the Chopped Kitchen to bring all they've got to the first two rounds to see who gets to face Bobby Flay!

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 1
programme.desc: For this tournament event, 16 champions are back to defeat Chef Bobby Flay. In the premiere battle, a strangely sweet sandwich and beautiful seafood await the champs. Round two involves an unusual beef jerky product and a twist on hummus.

programme.title: Chopped: Here to Persevere!
programme.desc: The competing chefs work quickly to make appetizers from chewy candy and a canned sauce. Inspiring sweets in the dessert basket, including a nostalgic powder, keep the final two chefs on their toes.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Birthday Bash
programme.desc: In this birthday-themed competition, the chefs whip up celebratory sweets starting with popcorn in the first basket. The chefs are challenged with a basket containing insect flour. The finalists try to come out on top with a tough third basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Three Cheers For Chocolate!
programme.desc: Four talented pastry chefs get to make a chocolate feast for the Chopped judges. In the first round of this all-desserts battle, the competitors must make dark chocolate creations that include a prized fruit and a salty snack.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Mom Life
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes quick and easy recipes that let her spend more time enjoying her life as a new mom. She starts off with savory Green Pancakes for lunch, and then she's in dinner mode with a hearty Funeral Hotdish and a crunchy Romaine Salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Falafel Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a Middle Eastern feast for her college friends visiting the farm, and the food is as colorful as the company! Molly starts with her crispy falafel and a creamy homemade labneh.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Mex
programme.desc: To celebrate her husband Nick's birthday, Molly Yeh surprises him by making his favourite Mexican cuisine- with a Midwestern twist of course! She cooks up a taco hotdish, chili-lime fruit salad and ham and cheese jalapeno poppers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Suppers
programme.desc: Molly is cooking up her most delicious and memorable suppers from her early days on the farm. She makes two upper-Midwest classics for a weeknight dinner with her husband Nick and his parents including chicken pot hot dish and a sweet cookie 'salad.'

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Summer Mega Salads
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is singing the praises of amazing main course summer salads that she has made over the years.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kansas Cookin'
programme.desc: Ree creates awesome breakfast burritos packed with spicy egg-and-meat scramble.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast on the Run
programme.desc: It's the story of three awesome grab and go breakfasts. Breakfast cookies are a perfect jump start on the morning. Then there's a bountiful bento box with baked oatmeal and individual ham casseroles. Finally, Todd makes apple granola stackers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Good Morning Drummond Ranch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond welcomes the morning at the Drummond ranch and makes a pairing of savory breakfast kabobs and sweet breakfast kabobs with shortcut doughnut holes and honey yogurt dipping sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Shipping Season
programme.desc: The family has been working hard shipping cattle and is ready for a fabulous lunch, so Ree Drummond is cooking up fun Spicy Sausage Dogs in a curry and onion sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboy and Cowgirl Lunch

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Budget Games Blowout

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Culinary Saved My Life 2

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: 24 Hours or Else

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Best Frenemies Forever

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Florida Fun and Fury

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Wild, Wild Key West
programme.desc: The ladies drive to Key West in two divided groups. As they prepare to go to a drag show, Gina and Emily worry about something Vicki has done in regards to Kelly. Gina and Emily try to convince Vicki to come clean with Kelly about what she's done.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Some Fences Are Made to Be Broken
programme.desc: Wrapping up their trip to Florida, Vicki returns from the hospital with a sprained ankle. Tamra and Shannon go parasailing, while Gina faces her fears of murky water. On a sunset cruise, Kelly attempts to make amends with some of the women.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County: Whooping It Up for Wedding Bells

programme.title: Counting Cars: Change of Heart
programme.desc: Danny has a last-minute change of heart and can't let go of a classic car he promised to sell to a loyal customer. Later, Kevin and Scott try to score a bike on their own, while Danny ditches lunch for a vintage Cadillac.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Special Delivery
programme.desc: After blowing two sales, Danny finally gets to customize a 1960 Chevy Delivery the way he wants to. Then, Danny gets some bad news on a client and Mike goes head to horn with 2000 lbs. of angry bull.

programme.title: Counting Cars: I Want My Caddy Back
programme.desc: Danny gets a call from Kevin's brother, who wants to sell Danny a 1969 Cadillac, but they can't let Kevin know or else he'll never trust his brother or Danny again.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Talkin' to Me?
programme.desc: A Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Danny tries to diffuse the situation before it gets explosive.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bucks and Broncos Part One
programme.desc: Danny is inspired to take back on an old project that he's already sunk a lot of time and money into. For the shop to make any profit on the 1967 Ford Bronco, they will have to turn it around quickly.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bucks and Broncos Part Two
programme.desc: Danny has a customer all lined up to buy his 1967 Ford Bronco he's restoring, but Ryan's mistake has set the project way back. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli settle a score at a gun range with Shannon keeping the peace.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Black, White and Hotrod All Over
programme.desc: Danny and the boys meet with a customer who wants a wicked paint job to match his 1959 Anglia dragster. Meanwhile, Shannon and Ryan are building a custom Harley Davidson Bagger for a client using a repurposed police bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fighting Ford
programme.desc: Danny has a customer who wants to restore a 1942 Ford truck that saw some action in WWII. But when Danny takes in the project, he quickly learns it'll need a lot more love than he thought. Roli and Ryan check out a '71 Duster.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Fighting Ford
programme.desc: The shop has its hands full restoring a 1942 Ford truck that needed a lot of TLC and a special touch for the owner's wife. Danny and Ryan check out a badass 1929 Ford Roadster, while Gary pulls one over on Mike in the paint shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Down by the Riviera
programme.desc: Legendary rocker George Lynch from the metal band Dokken stops by with his very cool 1965 Buick Riviera. He gives Danny free rein to put the Count's Kustoms rock 'n' roll touch on it. Also, Roli and Horny Mike custom wrap Roli's detailing van.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Lego My Caddy
programme.desc: Danny has big plans for a big client. Ryan discovers that smaller jobs aren't always easier, as he attempts to put a Counts Kustoms paint job on a high-tech Lego car.

programme.title: Counting Cars: CHiPs Bike
programme.desc: Kevin's brother Steve wants a 1980 Kawasaki KZ100 motorcycle tricked out just like the ones on the classic TV series, CHiPs. He and Danny try to keep the project a secret, but Kevin finds out and plans a surprise of his own.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Griff is in the House!

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore

programme.desc: A string of shark attacks at New Smyrna beach in Florida has left beachgoers in fear. Local scientists search for clues to what's causing the attacks. Then, in Wyoming rangers and vets search for the cause behind hundreds of elk suddenly becoming sick.

programme.title: Sharkatraz
programme.desc: Right in the middle of an area called The Red Triangle, the waters around Alcatraz are home to a variety of dangerous shark species, including the dreaded Great White. We'll investigate real shark attacks and join Scott Casellas as he dives in.

programme.title: World's Biggest Great White?
programme.desc: Deep Blue, believed to be the largest shark ever photographed, surfaces in Hawaii.

programme.title: Eyewitness Shark Attack: Facing Jaws
programme.desc: Shark attacks caught on video reveal clues to help us understand sharks like never before.

programme.title: Shark Alley
programme.desc: The great sardine migration creates a feeding frenzy for sharks of all types. Ragged tooths, hammerheads, tigers and more are drawn to the shoals of sardines for an easy meal.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: US Navy UFO Enigma
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the truth of an unexplained encounter between the US Navy and UFOs that miraculously seem to defy the laws of physics, and a cutting edge archaeological investigation uncovers long-lost secrets behind Noah's Ark.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Cannibal Ship Nightmare
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates discoveries at an infamous pair of shipwrecks in the Arctic. Using the latest tech and cutting-edge science, experts turn up evidence of cannibalism, poisoning, and insanity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Aliens of the Abyss
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates top-secret reports of underwater alien activity, and with the help o cutting-edge science, he reveals the truth behind a close encounter between the US military and a UFO with out-of-this world technology.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Cannibal Ship Nightmare
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates discoveries at an infamous pair of shipwrecks in the Arctic. Using the latest tech and cutting-edge science, experts turn up evidence of cannibalism, poisoning, and insanity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Caligula's Forbidden Fleet
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates evidence of a lost fleet of ancient ships that once belonged to Rome's mad emperor, and using cutting-edge tech, he reveals these wrecks' link to one of the twentieth century's greatest villains.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: 17-year-old Mary Jayne Jones is full of nubile innocence when she moves to small town Iowa and gets a job waiting tables. She trusts that there's good in everyone... but she's wrong. And it's a mistake that will cost Jayne her life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Why Did She Leave?
programme.desc: She is an innocent bride-to-be; he's a six-year-old schoolboy. Both are on the road, away from home, when they disappear.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Clues
programme.desc: Two 20-year-olds suffer personal tragedies then have their own lives abruptly snuffed out. He's shot while hanging out with friends; she disappears, only to turn up dead in a staged suicide.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Why Did She Leave?
programme.desc: She is an innocent bride-to-be; he's a six-year-old schoolboy. Both are on the road, away from home, when they disappear.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Clues
programme.desc: Two 20-year-olds suffer personal tragedies then have their own lives abruptly snuffed out. He's shot while hanging out with friends; she disappears, only to turn up dead in a staged suicide.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Retiree Alex Strategos moves to Florida to be closer to his son, but loneliness consumes him. He turns to internet dating and finds 69 year-old Melissa, but is soon struck by a rush of unexplained illnesses.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Candyman
programme.desc: Candy Williams has recently moved to the idyllic beach town of Gulfport, Florida. When she a meets handsome stranger at the beach, she thinks life can't get any better. But a fantasy romance becomes a real life horror story as his past comes to life.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Any Other Day
programme.desc: When Shirlee Sherman and Thomas Hunter are found stabbed to death in an upscale home in Omaha, Nebraska, suspects and clues are in short supply. It will take Detectives five years to zero on a perpetrator, but not before he kills again.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Delves into real-life crime and justice cases, examining them from all angles.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death of An Olympian
programme.desc: Olympic hero Dave Laut was shot six times with his own gun, his wife, Jane, pulled the trigger but says it was in self-defense. He was going to kill me, Jane tells Erin Moriarty and I didn't think I was going to live that night.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: A Colorado man loses two wives in freak accidents but family members don't believe his story.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Road to Redemption
programme.desc: For more than two decades, a woman struggled to understand why her sister and brother-in-law were murdered by an intruder. Today, she is trying to heal by meeting the shooter face-to-face to get those answers.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: The Sickness
programme.desc: Sue always dreamed of her own little quiet piece of paradise, but her dreams go up in smoke when a sinister guest comes knocking on August 27, 2001.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: When Marlys Sather doesn't return to work after a lunch appointment, her family makes a horrifying discovery. The cops search for the person who set fire to this loving mother of three.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own
programme.desc: Native Swede, Marioara Shand, is setting out on her own in Taos, New Mexico, after a recent breakup. One day in July of 2002, police discover her body in a brutal, bloody scene inside her new home.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Argo: The Secret Story
programme.desc: America is at its knees as the infamous US Embassy Hostage crisis begins, but then the CIA discovers that six diplomats have secretly escaped. When they recruit in their ace 'rescue' agent Tony Mendez to get them out, he devises a 'Hollywood'- plan.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Techie's Tiny Home
programme.desc: A Texas tech guru brings his work home by incorporating cutting-edge technology into his tiny house. The high-tech abode features a biometric security system and a hidden computer that allows him to adjust the lighting, appliances and windows.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Jamestown, NY
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Jamestown, NY, for their second go at salvaging a home that's been expanded to create a 26,000-square-foot Moose Lodge. The mixed architecture turns over an array of treasures, including neon lights and ornate roofing tiles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: North Carolina Pick and Haul
programme.desc: The gang travel to North Carolina in hopes of salvaging a Mediterranean-style mansion in Charlotte and an iconic sign in Raleigh. Though many of the items have been set aside, loading stone tubs and three-tier chandeliers presents its own challenges.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Maryland Strip Mall
programme.desc: The crew returns to Largo, MD, where they harvest items from a sporting goods store at the Boulevard at the Capital Centre. Robert and Grayson salvage the electrical system while Mike, Tay and Ted remove exterior beams for a future cantilever bench.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dublin Mill
programme.desc: The Dawgs travel to Dublin, Virginia, to help remove a dated water turbine from the historic Belle-Hampton Farm. After a full day of salvage, Mike and Tay return to the shop to build a kitchen island cart.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1825 Family Room Fix
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked to restore a crumbling family room and adjacent sun room in an 1825 stone home. He and his team bring in a stunning bluestone floor and create tons of built-in storage. They transform the sun room into an airy home office.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Dining Room Discoveries
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff to restore every ounce of character he can find in their historic home. They also want him to bring a little history into their 1970s living room addition. Jeff finds not one, but two big surprises hidden in the dining room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1798 Living Room Switch
programme.desc: A couple with a home built in 1798 enlists Jeff to transform their original living room into a dining room to fit their growing family. Then, Jeff and the crew uncover an amazing surprise while stripping down an original wood mantel.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740s Mudroom From Scratch
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked with turning a couple's wide-open front porch into an enclosed mudroom that blends the 1740s stone portion of their home with the 1800s wood siding portion. He also uncovers a gorgeous stone fireplace while restoring the living room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1735 Master Bedroom Retreat
programme.desc: Jeff meets up with a homeowner to restore the living room and bedroom in the oldest portion of her 1735 stone home. Jeff lowers an historic mantel in the living room and turns the master into a retreat with a wall of stone.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Overhaul
programme.desc: Jeff is challenged to bring out the history in an 1802 farmhouse that has had a number of questionable renovations throughout its 200 years. His clients want original stone and ceiling beams in the dining room and an overhaul of the fireplace.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1732 Kitchen Relocation
programme.desc: Jeff visits a couple at their 1732 home to address their wish to build a new kitchen in their living room. During the renovation, they face a few bumps as they knock down a wall, relocate the plumbing and try to bring some history back to the space.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1750s Inn Revival
programme.desc: A couple that's in over their heads with their home that was once a historic inn calls on Jeff to turn two rooms into a tavern-like entertaining space. The team quickly find issues when they uncover the fireplace and try to install an exposed beam.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Newlyweds Renovate Down the Shore
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jamie and Emily both grew up going to the Jersey Shore for family vacations. Now they're looking for a beachside bargain that they can renovate, but that might be tough to come by near the beaches of the Greater Atlantic City.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Holy Smokes!
programme.desc: Roger attends the 100 year anniversary of the St. Mary Magdalene Church Picnic in Owensboro, Kentucky. Several thousand pounds of meat will cook over 100 feet of fire and smoke.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light It Up!
programme.desc: Nothing grabs Roger's attention like a raging wood-burning fire. After the flames subside and the smoke clears, there's a spectacular feast that everyone can dive into. Roger heads to Bigmista's Barbecue & Sammich Shop.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger's in Southern California for two unbelievable backyard blowouts. Roger meets Chef Ben Ford in Tarzana.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat on a Stick
programme.desc: Roger visits two chefs in Texas who created the craziest cooking contraptions and prove that everything's bigger in Texas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Key Largo

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.
