programme.desc: When Rizzo the Rat arrives and makes a mess in the playroom, the only way the Muppet Babies can get him to stop is to defeat him in a dance-off. Summer is tired of being the smallest Muppet Baby and enlists Dr. Bunsen Honeydew and Beaker to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Firefighter Pups / Hike Paw
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Powers / Do The Gekko
programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks ally with them to vanquish Romeo. Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Alarm on the Farm
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: All Aboard Babies
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Rakhi Mystery/ Mystery Below the Palace
programme.desc: When the bracelets that Mira and her friends made for the Rakhi holiday disappear, Mira sets out to find them before the celebration starts. When strange sounds are heard at the palace, Queen Shanti asks Mira to find out what is causing the ruckus.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: You Quack Me Up / Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Donald decides to win the pranking contest for April Fool's Day. When Chip and Dale have a roommate squabble, they ask the Happy Helpers to find them each a new home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Owlette and the Moonflower/ Slowpoke Gekko
programme.desc: Luna Girl uses her Luna Beam to create a giant evil moonflower. If Gekko doesn't learn how to stop being distracted he won't be able to stop Romeo.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Pondweed/ Owlette Comes Clean
programme.desc: Gekko's powers increase by power pondweed during an underwater mission. While trying to stop Luna Girl, Owlette breaks an observatory's telescope lens and blames her nemesis.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pete's Beach Blanket Luau
programme.desc: It's the hottest day of the year and Pete decides to put on a Luau down at the lake.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Thinking Cap
programme.desc: When Clarabelle Cow plans a fun scavenger hunt for the Clubhouse pals, Professor Von Drake lets Goofy borrow his new invention to help everyone figure out the clues.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Agent Double-O-Goof/ Egg-xasperating!
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the Queen of England to come for tea, Goofy is mistaken for a secret agent in charge of delivering a top-secret briefcase. The Happy Helpers are charged with watching Clara Cluck's egg while she runs errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Bed, Breakfast and Bungled!
programme.desc: The Happy Helpers try to help a Bed and Breakfast, but Clarabelle's excitement causes problems.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Farm Fun-Fair!
programme.desc: Everyone wins a Blue Ribbon for participating in Mickey's Farm Fun-Fair.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Genie
programme.desc: Donald becomes a genuine magical genie and realizes it is not as easy as it sounds when he is only able to grant one wish to each Clubhouse friend.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Frog Prince
programme.desc: Donald gets turned into a frog when he drinks Professor Von Drake's new potion.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Surprise
programme.desc: Mickey presents his Fun Puzzles.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks
programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald of the Desert
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends travel to the faraway Desert to get sand for the Clubhouse Sandbox.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Fancy Dancin' Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy is taught how to act like a gentleman when Clarabelle asks him to go to the Dance.

programme.title: Chuggington: It's Not Easy Being Clean / Monkey Sitting
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Mousekersize!
programme.desc: When Pete can hardly get through a game of basketball without collapsing from exhaustion, Mickey and his Clubhouse pals show Pete the fun of exercising, leaving the big cat feeling stronger, more energetic, happy and healthy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Grand Food Truck Rally/ Cuckoo La-La
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals race in a grand food truck rally in Paris. While in Paris, the happy helpers help famous fashion designer Cuckoo La-La with a fashion show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Hanami Hijinks! / Happy Harajuku Helpers!
programme.desc: Daisy wants to celebrate Hanami with a perfect picnic, unfortunately things go a little haywire! The Happy Helpers participate in the annual Harajuku Fest in Tokyo!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mongoose Cousin Mystery/ The Marble Egg Mystery
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku's cousins visit Jalpur for a kite festival. Then, when the Prince loses a precious marble gift from the Queen, Mira sets out to find it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Runaway Love/ Tour De McStuffins
programme.desc: Doc's little brother Donny worries that the arrival of the new baby will take attention away from him, so he hatches a plan to run away. Meanwhile, Doc is so busy helping her parents prepare for the new baby that Lambie also starts to feel left out.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Secret Agent Double-Oh-Frog / A Tale of Two Twins
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dinklescouts/ I Dream of Cosmo
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Mr. Dinkleberg would replace Dad as Squirrely Scout leader. Dad tries to regain Timmy's respect and his leader position.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad/ Knighty Knight
programme.desc: Timmy gives Mom and Dad superpowers; Timmy wishes he could go to the real Middle Ages.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Room of One's Own/ Carts and Crafts
programme.desc: Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be. When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in contest to win a new bike.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Adventures in Babysitting/ Alvin's Assistant
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvin's babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvin's assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: Alvin, Simon and Theodore are under their cousin Toby's care. Upon returning to school, they are tasked with winning a music competition whose cash prize will save the school's music department. They find competition in the form of the Chipettes.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Team Effort/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies work together to show their coach that they have what it takes to make a team. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Loud House: Overnight Success/ Ties that Bind

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flash of Light! Shining Crux!
programme.desc: Delta and Blindt decide who'll walk away the victor, while Pheng takes the Victories back to his temple so that Arman can make good on his promise.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: From Z to Shining Z
programme.desc: Ash’s win at the Alola Pokémon League was astounding—but the resulting exhibition match has some colossal surprises in store, too!

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Rat-a-Phooey!
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Gordan Hamsay
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.desc: A surfer girl falls for a football player while preparing for an important competition.

programme.title: Ray Donovan: Irish Spring
programme.desc: Ray gets compromising information on Cochran. Avi follows Kate as she investigates, but Ray will need to give her a new story. Meanwhile, Abby tries to have fun with her prospective new neighbors. Marvin takes Bridget to a party at Cookie Brown's house.

programme.title: City on a Hill: Mayor Curley and The Last Hurrah

programme.desc: A group of New York strippers turn the tables on their wealthy Wall Street clients taking them for everything they have.

programme.title: Movie: Scary Stories to Tell in the Dark

programme.title: Movie: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: A cab driver is pulled back into a military mission by a former superior to protect a mysterious woman who holds the key to saving Earth. Together, they retrieve four stones that represent the elements in order to stop an entity of pure evil.

programme.title: Movie: Remember
programme.desc: A holocaust survivor discovers that the German guard who killed his entire family is living under a different name in the United States. With the help of another survivor, he plots to bring justice and revenge to the man who took his family from him.

programme.title: Movie: The Bounce Back

programme.title: Movie: Slow West

programme.desc: The life of Mahatma Gandhi, a revolutionary figure and national hero who led the non-violent protests in India that eventually weakened British rule.

programme.title: Movie: Waves
programme.desc: A family navigates love and forgiveness in the aftermath of a loss.

programme.desc: A banker is wrongly convicted of a double murder and is sent to prison for life.

programme.desc: The crazy adventures of the dysfunctional Simpson family are set against a backdrop of satire, cynicism and greed.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Joneses
programme.desc: Jeff and Karen are surprised to find their new neighbours are much more sophisticated and talented than they are. Spying on them, they learn that the couple are covert operatives. Forced to go on the run, they attempt to help the Joneses on their mission.

programme.title: Movie: There's Something About Mary
programme.desc: Thirteen years after their high school prom, Ted still has a crush on Mary. Finally deciding to act on his feelings, he hires Pat, a private investigator, to find her. Pat lies about what he's discovered because the sleazy detective has fallen for Mary.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being stood up at the altar, Robby's entire world is turned upside down. Performing for wedding receptions and bar mitzvahs only serves as a constant reminder of his unhappiness, until he meets and falls in love with a waitress named Julia.

programme.title: Movie: The Book of Eli
programme.desc: A drifter in a post-apocalyptic society travels across America, protecting the last copy of the King James Bible in order to deliver it to the west coast so it can help save humanity. However, an evil gang lord seeks to take the book for himself.

programme.title: Movie: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: Still haunted by his past, Max wanders alone through a barren landscape until he takes up with a group on the run from an enraged warlord.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: A world class roster of diverse wrestlers give fans a new wrestling experience.

programme.title: Movie: Riddick
programme.desc: Riddick faces a predatory alien race and sends out an emergency signal that reaches two ships.

programme.title: Movie: The Book of Eli
programme.desc: A drifter in a post-apocalyptic society travels across America, protecting the last copy of the King James Bible in order to deliver it to the west coast so it can help save humanity. However, an evil gang lord seeks to take the book for himself.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Baitfish

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Abyss
programme.desc: When a navy Admiral's daughter is the prime suspect in double murders aboard a research boat, the team partners with the Coast Guard Investigative Service to work the case. Meanwhile, Lasalle tracks down his estranged brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: Charmed: Vaya Con Leos

programme.title: Charmed: Mr. and Mrs. Witch
programme.desc: While Piper tires to deal with Leo being gone and Phoebe gets a bad case of writer's block, Billie discovers the power of projection when she inadvertently transforms her visiting parents into cold-blooded assassins.

programme.title: Charmed: Payback's a Witch
programme.desc: When Henry's parolee, Nick, crashes his car into a bank after being denied a loan, Paige and Billie must come up with a non-magical solution. Elsewhere, Piper and Phoebe have their hands full when Wyatt uses his magic to make his toys come to life.

programme.title: Charmed: Repo Manor
programme.desc: As Billie continues the search for her missing sister, the Charmed Ones are miniaturized and imprisoned in a dollhouse by a demon who hopes to channel the Power of Three and kill the Demonic Master Clan that has enslaved his demon tribe.

programme.title: Supernatural: The One You've Been Waiting For
programme.desc: After learning that the soul of Adolf Hitler has been trapped in a 1930’s gold pocket watch, Sam and Dean must act quickly to prevent a group of Nazi necromancers from resurrecting the Furor.

programme.title: Supernatural: Celebrating the Life of Asa Fox

programme.title: Supernatural: Rock Never Dies
programme.desc: Lucifer realizes that as a rock star, he can get his fans to do whatever he wants. Thrilled with this power, Lucifer arranges to play a secret VIP concert.

programme.title: Supernatural: First Blood

programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.desc: Andy and Ashley take on what appears to be a great flip in the up-and-coming suburb of Watauga. Their goal is to get in and get out in record time to make some quick cash.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Old Houses, New Profits
programme.desc: One team take on a triplex and turn it into a single-family home is Boise, Idaho while another team tackle a turn of the century home that's fallen into disrepair in Redlands, California.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Water vs. Fire
programme.desc: In this head-to-head, house flipping challenge, 'Good Bones' Mina and Karen take on Lindsey and Eric from 'Desert Flippers' to see whose investment will lead to the biggest profit.

programme.title: Flipping Across America
programme.desc: It's a battle of the small house flip, as Flip or Flop's Tarek and Christina add major upgrades to virtually every inch of a 900 square foot home, while Boise Boys' Clint and Luke spend all their money on expansions.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Battle for Bedrooms
programme.desc: It's a bedroom add-on challenge, as Going For Sold's Jon and Mary are up against layout issues as they try to add a bedroom to a Houston home while staying in the original footprint. Flip or Flop's Anita and Ken face the challenge of using an addition.

programme.title: Home Town: Restoring a Craftsman

programme.title: Home Town: Small Budget, Big Style

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel

programme.desc: Jake hunts a school bus-stalking lion; Tom ends trapping season on a high note; Eustace and Raleigh have difficulties putting a roof on their outpost cabin; Morgan Margaret prepare their horses for a supply run; Jason takes on his first Ozark build.

programme.desc: The Nazis created the Hitler Youth to develop an army of child soldiers who fought until Germany’s defeat.

programme.title: Revenge on the Nazis
programme.desc: In the dying days of World War II, a secret organization of Holocaust survivors plans to kill 6 million Germans.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Attack on America
programme.desc: Scientists search the ocean for a shipwreck connected to Hitler. The U.S. government hid it after Hitler's Navy dropped a deadly assault on American ships on December 19, 1941.

programme.desc: Venture into a world of ludicrous-looking, bizarrely behaved and downright Shocking Sharks to discover a new side to these feared fish. The tasselled wobbegong uses frilled camouflage to blend into coral reef surroundings.

programme.desc: Explore the living, breathing, colourful mountains of coral that shelter an extraordinarily diverse group of species of every colour, shape and behaviour.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Sand Wars
programme.desc: Discover the multitudes of bizarre creatures that make the sandy plains of the seabed their home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bull Shark
programme.desc: Secrets of the Bull Shark unravels the mystery of some of the most dangerous predators.

programme.title: Built for the Kill: Great White Sharks
programme.desc: An adult great white shark has 300 teeth and weighs 3,000 pounds. Pound for pound, a great white has one of the most powerful bite forces of any living creature.

programme.title: Shark v. Tuna
programme.desc: An oceanic clash of the titans between yellowfin tuna, mako, and tiger sharks in the crystal-blue battlefields of Ascension Island.

programme.title: Shark vs. Whale
programme.desc: Marine biologist Ryan Johnson discovers rare behavior of a whale attacking a great white.

programme.title: Shark vs Predator
programme.desc: Sharks are rulers of the aquatic world, molded by evolution into a fierce predator. Few dare to challenge the king of the ocean, but we investigate what kinds of animals would be daring enough to take on these killing machines.

programme.title: Sharks vs. Dolphins: Blood Battle
programme.desc: There’s a war being waged beneath the waves: sharks versus dolphins.

programme.title: Most Wanted Sharks
programme.desc: Big teeth, powerful bodies-these sharks are so outstanding they've become worldwide celebrities with their own fans and followers. A look into the stories of the biggest shark stars of all-time.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed
programme.desc: Justin Cunningham and his team of intrepid reporters uncover the world’s most bizarre engineering blunders and find out how to fix them.

programme.title: When Elevators Attack
programme.desc: When elevators go rogue, they can take people captive, trap them inside, and suddenly plummet down their shafts. Hear personal testimony from victims who reveal the truth behind frightening elevator malfunctions and what it takes to survive.

programme.title: Super Factories: Maserati Mega Plant
programme.desc: Maserati takes production of their luxury automotive brand to another level at the Mirafiori facility in Turin, Italy, where the highest standards of materials and manufacturing result in handcrafted cars built on a cutting-edge assembly line.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Falling Victim Hoax
programme.desc: Paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance crew fall victim to an elaborate hoax after a rock climber claims to have fallen off a cliff, but turns out to be unhurt. Also, a herd of cows turns on a stockman and leaves him with life threatening injuries.

programme.title: When Elevators Attack
programme.desc: When elevators go rogue, they can take people captive, trap them inside, and suddenly plummet down their shafts. Hear personal testimony from victims who reveal the truth behind frightening elevator malfunctions and what it takes to survive.

programme.title: Super Factories: Maserati Mega Plant
programme.desc: Maserati takes production of their luxury automotive brand to another level at the Mirafiori facility in Turin, Italy, where the highest standards of materials and manufacturing result in handcrafted cars built on a cutting-edge assembly line.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Falling Victim Hoax
programme.desc: Paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance crew fall victim to an elaborate hoax after a rock climber claims to have fallen off a cliff, but turns out to be unhurt. Also, a herd of cows turns on a stockman and leaves him with life threatening injuries.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Explosions from Hell
programme.desc: When demolitions don't go as planned, engineers race for cutting-edge solutions to bring down buildings that refuse to fall, and at the world-renowned Pontiac Silverdome in Michigan, experts try to succeed when the world's most powerful explosives fail.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Stuck in the Middle
programme.desc: When Paula Cardwell returns from running errands, she finds her 20-year-old daughter, Anna Catherine, lying dead on the kitchen floor. The small town of Wetumpka, Alabama, is left stunned and determined to find the devil in their midst.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Dragged to Hell
programme.desc: Amanda Storms watches her high school sweetheart transform from great stepdad to abusive husband. When he moves out, she's grateful for the help of her friend Andrew Shepherd - until a terrible night of violence changes everything.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: This is Not a Drill
programme.desc: It was an ordinary day at Chardon High School in Ohio, full of the fights, laughs and boisterous behaviour that fill the corridors of any high school. But all that changes when one young man shows up with violence on his mind.

programme.title: Impact of Hate: Charlottesville
programme.desc: Charlottesville votes to remove its confederate statues, and the Far Right descends for 2017's Unite the Right Rally. As concerned citizens gather against an influx of hate, a car plows into a crowd, killing Heather Heyer, on her first demonstration.

programme.title: Shattered: Butcher on Mincey Road
programme.desc: When a woman's marriage takes a violent turn, her daughter seeks refuge at the nearby home of a caring neighbor. She has no idea, however, that the place she considers a safe haven is not at all what it seems.

programme.title: Impact of Hate: Charlottesville
programme.desc: Charlottesville votes to remove its confederate statues, and the Far Right descends for 2017's Unite the Right Rally. As concerned citizens gather against an influx of hate, a car plows into a crowd, killing Heather Heyer, on her first demonstration.

programme.title: Shattered: The Wood
programme.desc: 1990's. Portland, OR. A young woman survives a vicious attack... a mother sees her worst nightmare come true... and a detective investigating a series of murders finds the killer is someone he's met before.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Widow's War
programme.desc: A marine colonel fatally wounded in Iraq was said to have died by suicide, but his wife claims it was murder. See the story of a family's quest to change the medical examiner's findings in a case that tests convincing and competing forensic theories.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Vengeance in Vegas
programme.desc: A mom was brutally murdered after her shift as a casino cocktail waitress in Las Vegas.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: A Promise Kept
programme.desc: Investigating a deadly robbery-gone-bad at a Charlotte, NC fast food restaurant, Detective Garry McFadden discovers the victim was targeted for execution. In finding justice, McFadden also finds an unexpected, life-long emotional connection.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Home Improvement
programme.desc: When a female professional suddenly vanishes, her family and friends are baffled. Two weeks later, a body is discovered along a highway in another county. It carries subtle clues that could lead Detective Garry McFadden right to the killer's door.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Murder Becomes Personal
programme.desc: A case becomes personal for Charlotte, North Carolina Homicide Detective Garry McFadden when a friend becomes a murder victim. It gets doubly personal when the killer also turns out to be someone close to him.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: New Years Evil
programme.desc: When a popular young woman turns up murdered, investigators must piece together the last few moments of her life to determine who killed her.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Knives and Lies
programme.desc: When a well-liked teenage boy is found stabbed to death in his Salt Lake City, UT home, detectives leave no stone unturned in their quest to solve the murder that rocked this normally tranquil town.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Sinister Secret
programme.desc: In rural Wyoming, a young teen is found strangled and violated after vanishing from her group home.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Absent Teacher
programme.desc: In 1993, an elementary school teacher goes missing after her first day at a new job. Over the next two months, investigators sift through clues, piecing together the heartbreaking truth behind the young educator's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Evil Blossoms
programme.desc: When Alisha Bromfield's supervisor, Brian Cooper, promotes her to team leader she should be ecstatic. But Brian's motives are not entirely good. Alisha stands her ground with Brian, letting him know she doesn't want a relationship beyond co-workers.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas
programme.desc: A woman and her kids have been vacationing in Port Aransas, TX, for years and are ready to own a piece of their favorite paradise.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Traveling Nurses' Mobile Abode
programme.desc: Traveling nurses want to finish their tiny home build before their next assignment. The couple must work around the clock to complete the anything-but-ordinary home with its bright blue exterior, giant bedroom and built-in snake cage.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: All-New Deck For Repeat Client
programme.desc: A former Mega Decks customer buys a new house and needs a new deck. Find out if Andy and the build crew can live up to the client's heightened expectations and deliver a second mega deck that beats the first.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Southern Plantation-Style Deck
programme.desc: A couple wants to add a deck to their home in Louisiana. The current deck is rotting and offers no protection from the heat or insect, so Garth's plantation-style design includes enclosed rooms and air conditioning.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Making a Splash in Arizona
programme.desc: Jeromey and Jay of Premier Pools create a personal resort for Arizona newcomers: Sally and Samer.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool
programme.desc: Vic and Yukari had to leave their beloved pool behind when they moved into a California community. Brian and Paul must create an epic pool in the couple's new, small space, and the design includes an exposed acrylic wall holding back water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rocky Road to Backyard Bliss
programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's About Time
programme.desc: A family that had to delay pool plans after building a new home is finally ready to make their backyard vision a reality.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is spending the day at Jacobsen Salt Co., in Netarts Bay, Oregon, one of the largest producers of handcrafted sea salt in America. Owner Ben Jacobsen takes Roger on a tour of the facility, showing him how to smoke sea salt.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Extreme Eats
programme.desc: Food Paradise is going to extremes with the best in big food with even bigger flavour. Whether it's a Bloody Mary garnished with baby back ribs, mozzarella sticks and more or a palatial pizza made of chicken Parmesan, sometimes too much is not enough!

programme.title: Food Paradise: At the Drive-In
programme.desc: From crispy, juicy fried chicken and hearty chili cheese fries to zesty taco burgers and deep-fried hot dogs, diners are pulling up for a taste of Americana.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Street Eats
programme.desc: Diners get down and dirty with the best street food in the country, from chicken wings that defy crispiness and pizza-topped burgers to fiery hot shrimp and fresh-from-the-sea salmon tacos.

programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hot Deals in the Desert
programme.desc: Ali Khan looks for the best meal deals in Scottsdale, Arizona. He starts out strong with a double serving of Southern barbecue scones piled high with savory pulled pork.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Filling Up In Florida
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts the day strong with a Chopped champion's hearty French crepe with an American twist and then keeps things rolling at a Brooklyn-style deli.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Desserts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking skips straight to the sweets as he dives headlong into the 15 best desserts offered in the United States. From the rich and chocolatey to the fruity and flavourful.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Stanislaus County Fair/ Texas Crab Fest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Stanislaus County Fair in Turlock, California. He gets his paws into homemade fries topped with lobster claws and tail meat, and devours a delicious donut ice cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King's Peach
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the Big Fresno Fair in California, where local legend Chicken Charlie has a triple treat stacked up on a stick.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities
programme.desc: There's something about pasta that's exciting, and Eddie Jackson shares a combination of savory sauces and a variety of textures for this ever-evolving ancient dish. No matter what, pasta has endless pasta-bilities!

programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Picture This/ Nerdy Dancin'
programme.desc: The boys build a transport device so that they can retrieve Ferb's skateboard from England. Candice asks Jeremy to be her dance partner in a dance show, but Jeremy can't dance.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz breaks a rogue animal agent out of high security prison and Perry must go to the glamorous Duchy of Montevillebad to stop Doof from winning the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheer Up, Candace/ Fireside Girl Jamboree
programme.desc: Candace is down after Jeremy cancels their date/ Candace hopes to join the Fireside Girls.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Battle in the Skies!
programme.desc: Dante challenges Pheng to a rematch. After the battle, the gang heads to Battle Island to compete in a Blading circuit.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Dreaming of the Sun and Moon!
Polaris: Player Select: Party Puppers
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Lord of the Jump Kings
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Movie: Yusuf Hawkins: Storm Over Brooklyn

programme.title: Movie: Valkyrie

programme.title: Movie: Western Stars
programme.desc: Bruce Springsteen performs his album 'Western Stars' from his ranch.

programme.title: Movie: She's the Man
programme.desc: When her twin brother ditches school for a trip to London, Viola takes his place in boarding school where she develops a crush on her soccer teammate.

programme.title: The Making of: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: The Others
programme.desc: A mother of two begins to suspect that the dark mansion they inhabit is actually haunted.

programme.title: Movie: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: A cyber-doctor finds parts of an abandoned cyborg with its human brain still intact in a trash heap, builds it a new body and treats it like a daughter, but when other cyborgs come to destroy her she finds that she possesses incredible fighting abilities.

programme.title: Hard Knocks: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The 2020 edition of the venerable series 'Hard Knocks' spotlights both Los Angeles NFL teams: the Los Angeles Chargers of the AFC West and the Los Angeles Rams of the NFC West.

programme.title: Movie: Die Hard II: Die Harder
programme.desc: A detective battles terrorists at an airport when a plot threatens hundreds of passengers.

programme.title: Movie: The Terminator
programme.desc: A cyborg is sent from the future to kill a woman who is destined to give birth to a liberator.

programme.title: Movie: Peppermint
programme.desc: A grieving mother takes justice into her own hands after corrupt officials let her husband and daughter's killers walk free. She begins violently dismantling the massive cartel that has the local police officers, judges and officials on its payroll.

programme.title: Movie: The Go-Go's
programme.desc: A look at the history and success of the all-female band The Go-Go's.

programme.title: We Hunt Together
programme.desc: When former child soldier Baba rescues Freddy from a sexual assault, something dark is ignited in them. Detectives Lola Franks and Jackson Mendy investigate the murder of the pair's first victim.

programme.title: Movie: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: One year after four teenagers disposed of the body of a pedestrian following a hit-and-run, each of them begin to receive letters telling them that someone else knows what happened that fateful night.

programme.title: Movie: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Four teenagers must face a killer fisherman while vacationing on a tropical island.

programme.title: Movie: I'll Always Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: A quartet of Colorado teenagers make a pact to conceal the truth when a Fourth of July prank results in the death of a friend. But one year after the incident, the reunited foursome finds itself stalked by a vengeful killer related to a legend.

programme.title: Desus & Mero: LOVE YOUR WORK
programme.desc: Seth Rogan and Cori Bush join the show.

programme.title: Movie: Amy
programme.desc: Previously unseen archive footage and unheard tracks shine a light on life of superstar and six-time Grammy winner Amy Winehouse, who died tragically of alcohol poisoning at the age of 27.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: A girl from the wrong side of town becomes involved with a popular and wealthy young man.

programme.title: Movie: Stepmom
programme.desc: A woman teaches both herself and her children to accept her ex-husband's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie: The Truman Show
programme.desc: A man discovers that his life is a carefully orchestrated TV show and plans to make his escape into the real world.

programme.title: Movie: Nighthawks
programme.desc: A young man and his roommate explore the New York nightlife.

programme.title: Movie: Semper Fi
programme.desc: A police officer and his Marine Corps Reserve friends plan to break his brother out of prison.

programme.title: Movie: The Grey
programme.desc: After their plane crashes in Alaska, seven men must fight against all nature's elements if there is any hope for survival.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunted
programme.desc: A former Delta Forces soldier, who went AWOL to protect himself and secret mission information, hides in the wilderness of the Pacific Northwest. When he kills two hunters, the authorities send his former instructor to find him and a chase ensues.

programme.title: Movie: Little Women
programme.desc: Four young women making the transition to adulthood lean on each other for support. When aspiring author Jo's novel is repeatedly rejected by publishers, her editor advises her write about the thing that she knows best -- her relationship with her family.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood

programme.desc: After napalm is detected at a crime scene, the team investigates the sole causality for possible links to terrorism.

programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit and run, the team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or her role as a foster mother to two brothers. Also, Lasalle grows increasingly concerned for his brother's welfare.

programme.title: Charmed: 12 Angry Zen
programme.desc: A monk teaches Billie how to harness her power of projection to find her sister. Elsewhere, Phoebe throws a housewarming party that gets out of control and Paige introduces Henry to the world of magic by taking him on an 'orb-along.'

programme.title: Charmed: The Last Temptation of Christy
programme.desc: Henry tries to immerse himself in Paige's magical world. Piper runs into her old flame and wonders if she is ready to put Leo's death behind her. Meanwhile, Billie finds her sister, Christy, who has been held captive by demons for several years.

programme.title: Charmed: Engaged and Confused

programme.title: Charmed: Generation Hex

programme.title: The King of Queens: Class Struggle
programme.desc: Carrie decides to go back to college after lawyers from work look down on her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti

programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find their sense of charity. Barry unearths a bag that has him hitting the slopes.
