programme.desc: Rene and Casey attempt to shut out Jarrod and Brandi. Darrell dodges a bullet to score an interesting locker.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dead in the Water

programme.desc: Sig and Jake have a massive falling out, leading to new strategies and new alliances. Josh Harris returns to captain his father's boat. Sean plays dirty, but Wild Bill shows him he's messing with the wrong Captain. With big rewards, come big risks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Man Down

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hillstrand's Last Catch
programme.desc: Two old friends race to finish their seasons, one with hopes of capping off a storied career. Johnathan Hillstrand wants to say goodbye in a blaze of glory but the Bering Sea may have different plans.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard desperately scours the Bering Sea for a missing crab vessel, while the fleet anxiously waits to discover the fate of its six-man crew. After a plea from his wife, Sig contemplates an early exit.

programme.title: Whale Wars: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: When the Bob Barker collides with a Japanese harpoon ship, Sea Shepherd is left to track the whaling fleet by helicopter. Hope begins to fade when blizzard conditions block communication and freezes the instruments.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Alaska's Lost River Kings
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Alaska to investigate the disappearance of the majestic king salmon. His search will take him through the heart of grizzly bear territory, remote native communities and ultimately the Pacific Ocean as he follows a trail of evidence.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Cold Water Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate reports of strange, alien species in the water surrounding the remote Aleutian Islands.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Toxic Invader
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the disappearance of fish in Australia's Fitzroy River. Evidence points to the arrival of a new top predator, but it could be something far more insidious spreading into Western Australia.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: South Africa's Legendary Beast
programme.desc: A recent sighting in South Africa of a bizarre beast - half human, half fish - draws Jeremy into the story of creature with ancient origins and a fearsome reputation.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Ice Age Predator
programme.desc: Tales of monstrous, man-sized pike have persisted in Europe for generations. Now, Jeremy Wade is on a journey to catch this prehistoric monster, starting in the lakes of Ireland and leading to unfished waters on the edge of the Arctic Circle in Sweden.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Return of the Outback Beast
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate a terrifying underwater attack by a beast in a remote outback river. As his investigation unfolds, Jeremy is faced with the exciting possibility that a giant predator he once thought extinct could be back.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast
programme.desc: Tasmania is home to species found nowhere else on earth, including a colossal freshwater beast capable of breaking a person's arm. Jeremy Wade will venture into the island's dense, eerie forests in search of this formidable creature.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Italy's Lake Monster
programme.desc: The Lake Garda monster has been described as a huge, humped bear - half snake, half dinosaur. Jeremy travels to northern Italy to investigate and discovers that these picturesque waters could be hiding several enormous beasts.

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror
programme.desc: The River Monsters in Japan are like no others Jeremy has ever encountered, from the devastating earthquake-causing catfish, the Namazu, to the sinister, child-snatching killer called the Kappa.

programme.desc: Angkor Wat, Cambodia, is the world's largest ancient religious temple. Within its megalithic ruins, researchers have discovered a depiction of a species of dinosaur: a stegosaurus.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Power Plants
programme.desc: Egyptian hieroglyphs depict the use of light bulbs; Mesopotamian batteries are found.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Satan Conspiracy
programme.desc: New interpretations of ancient texts indicate that Satan may have been an extraterrestrial who was more of an ally to humanity than an enemy by passing along knowledge that planted the seed for civilization.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Insects
programme.desc: Earth is home to 10 quintillion insects. In cultures throughout the world, insects have been honoured, feared and even revered as gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Today, we discuss ancient myths across a wide variety of cultures in which the gods are portrayed as intervening in human affairs. It is possible that these supernatural events may not be the work of gods, but rather proof of extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: City of the Gods
programme.desc: The ancient site of Teotihuacan in central Mexico is one of the world's greatest mysteries. Modern excavations at the site have unearthed discoveries of substances out of place in the ancient world.

programme.title: Movie: Dinner at Eight
programme.desc: A high-society dinner party masks a hotbed of scandal and intrigue.

programme.title: Movie: Night Club Scandal

programme.title: Movie: Arsene Lupin
programme.desc: A detective vows to bring a clever gentleman burglar to justice.

programme.title: Movie: Svengali

programme.title: Movie: The Great Man Votes

programme.title: Movie: The Honeymoon Machine
programme.desc: Sailors on a Navy ship try to use the boat's computer to win at roulette. Unfortunately, an Admiral intercepts the computer's output and assumes the fleet is about to be attacked.

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me

programme.desc: Features couples whose passion drives them to commit terrible criminal acts.

programme.desc: An arrogant cosmetic surgeon operating out of a basement permanently scars and kills patients, then shocks detectives by attempting to murder a loved one.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Trap
programme.desc: It was an affluent neighborhood with tree lined streets. Violent crime was unheard of here until that morning when, under the very noses of the cops, a terrible murder occurred. Investigators found a riddle, a deception, a piece of pure evil.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: When Todd Winkler was arrested for killing his wife Rachel, he claimed self-defense. Investigators learned Rachel wasn't the first Mrs. Winkler to die and traveled cross country to understand what happened on that camping trip a decade earlier.

programme.title: Dateline: Robert Durst: The Lost Years
programme.desc: Robert Durst's close friends and family speak out for the first time since his arrest for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: The House on Sidney's Cove
programme.desc: A wife and mother of three disappears without a trace. Could her home’s security cameras hold the key to solving the mystery? Dennis Murphy reports.

programme.title: Dateline: Twisted Tale
programme.desc: When Denise Huskins reappeared just two days after her boyfriend reported she was abducted, police accused the couple of perpetrating a hoax. But another, similar crime caused authorities to re-examine the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: An Army veteran vanishes before her college graduation. A massive search turns up nothing, but detectives do find a clue: a cryptic 911 call that helps uncover the truth and exposes a twisted story of unrequited love.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets
programme.desc: Charlie Tan was an Ivy Leaguer with a bright future but then, Charlie's dad was killed. Police were told one story but the evidence was telling another.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Confession
programme.desc: Soon after Angie Dodge was murdered, Christopher Tapp admitted he was one of her killers. Police captured his confession on videotape so why would the victim's mom, who once campaigned to put Tapp in prison fight to free him.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Poison
programme.desc: Larry McNabney had a thriving career and a wife he adored. Then he vanished. It was a mystery as twisted as they come. At its center: three lives tangled together in a love triangle, including one of them who was hiding a secret identity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: She was a dancer who married a dashing photographer. They seemed to have the picture-perfect life until the bone-chilling night she disappeared. In a case filled with twists, could the victim help solve her own murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Beast of Fear Island
programme.desc: A giant bear terrorizes the Alaskan wilderness and a team of experts use state-of-the-art technology to track down this mysterious beast.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Yeti: The Real Evidence
programme.desc: A new investigation into the legend of the Yeti uses cutting-edge science and technology to test the existence of this mysterious beast; what experts discover sheds new light on the mythical monster of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: The Loch Ness Monster is rumored to have destroyed a German World War 1 boat, and using new technology a team uncovers if the legendary sea monster could have caused the wreck.

programme.title: Mega Monsters: Giant Squid: The Dark Secrets
programme.desc: The ocean's darkest depths are home to mysterious creatures, but none more terrifying than the giant squid. Now experts use new technology to make shocking discoveries that might reveal the secrets of this fearsome monster.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Trapped in Hell
programme.desc: Lindsay Wrinkles always knew that her father had a short temper, but she never expected to be on the run from him when she was only 14. As she runs from hideout to hideout desperate to evade him, Lindsay wonders what will happen if he ever finds her.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: It was a business deal right out of a Hollywood movie. An investor in a Napa Valley winery ponied up $800,000 cash in an effort to make a fortune in fine wine. What he didn't realize then was he was investing in his own murder. Tracy Smith reports.

programme.title: The Case of the Missing Teacher
programme.desc: When a beloved high school teacher no-call, no-shows to an important event, her small western Michigan community is put on red alert.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: A Murder in Cordova
programme.desc: When the body of 43-year-old Tina Coronna is discovered in the backseat of her abandoned truck, detectives must piece together clues gleaned from the victim's emotional husband, his mistress, and a neighborhood vigilante.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: The Case of the Missing Teacher
programme.desc: When a beloved high school teacher no-call, no-shows to an important event, her small western Michigan community is put on red alert.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: A Murder in Cordova
programme.desc: When the body of 43-year-old Tina Coronna is discovered in the backseat of her abandoned truck, detectives must piece together clues gleaned from the victim's emotional husband, his mistress, and a neighborhood vigilante.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: After a beloved Florida physician was found dead in his mansion, police wade through his secret, dark past for clues.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: The Doctor Will See You Now
programme.desc: Examines the dark side of love with a peek into lust and obsession.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Swing and a Missus
programme.desc: Merchant marine Lee Sehorne's long stints at sea leave his young wife, Cristie, lonely. Cristie floats the idea of going to a swinger's club while Lee's away and he agrees to it. But her torrid affair with the club bouncer leads to tragedy for all.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Friends to the End
programme.desc: A close-knit group of co-workers are devastated when one of their own is found dead near a soccer field at the edge of their quiet Indiana town.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Nightmare on Bennington Drive
programme.desc: This quaint neighbourhood in Jacksonville, Florida seems to be an unlikely place for any crime at all, let alone murder.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Killer Coverup
programme.desc: A beloved friend and co-worker goes missing on a desolate mountain, and detectives must sort through a list of tightknit colleagues with potential motives for murder. One of them has crucial information that will lead to a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Forever and a Day
programme.desc: When a former police officer is dumped she takes the law into her own hands; a quiet housewife buries her marriage problems in the garden; and an excited fiancée turns into the worst kind of bridezilla.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: Find out what made these women so angry that they turned on the ones they loved.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Souls of Stone
programme.desc: Selfish women will sometimes sell their souls to the devil to get what they want. A scorned lover weaves a web of lies, a teenage Goth orders a reign of terror, and a gold-digger buries secrets in her basement.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Above the Law
programme.desc: For some, high social status is a license to kill. Trusted by the community, these ladies are beyond suspicion as the bodies pile up. No matter how heinous their crimes, these women get away with murder so easily; they assume they're entitled to do it.

programme.title: 20/20: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: When Vallejo, California resident Aaron Quinn reported that kidnappers broke into his home, abducted his girlfriend Denise Huskins, and demanded a ransom, their story garnered national attention.
A combination of interviews, feature stories and hard-hitting investigative reports are presented by seasoned reporters.

programme.title: 20/20: Tragedy on TV
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the events surrounding the murder of Alison Parker and Adam Ward who were shot on live TV. 20/20 shares all new details from the 23-page suicide note Bryce Williams sent as well as a look inside the mind of the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Maurice's Last Visitor
programme.desc: On December 10th, 2011, Maurice Byrd is found dead in his home with multiple gunshot wounds. Security footage from a neighboring church reveals that prior to his body being discovered, Maurice had many visitors.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.desc: A family in San Antonio, Texas, is remodeling their home and they want a custom pool that has something for everyone. Paul and Tony design a 13-foot-high, split-level pool with a baja shelf for Mom and plenty of entertainment space for Dad.

programme.desc: A medical student is tired of renting and isn't sure where her residency will take her, so she's building a tiny house that matches her resourceful personality.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Heights Cottage
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis turns her attention to a rundown cottage in Lake Orion, Michigan. Starting in the living room, she rips out an old staircase leading to the kitchen before making her way outside to create a new boardwalk entry, picket fence and back deck.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Campbell Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis returns to her hometown of Detroit to save a 1920s home that suffered severe damage from a fire next door.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Case Avenue House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis heads to St. Paul for the first time to work on a home in an up-and-coming neighborhood.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 25th Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis works to restore a 1920s bungalow and must tackle a ton of brickwork. Then, she transforms the unfinished attic into a one-of-a-kind master suite and restores the kitchen cabinets to create one of the home's most dazzling features.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Nicole's Grandparents' House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on her most personal project ever: a 1950s ranch-style home her grandparents built by hand. She restores the kitchen to its original layout and transforms the dingy work basement into a party-ready rec room.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.
